news.summary: The capture of the tanker ship Tifani follows a Trump administration directive to interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.

news.headline: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
news.summary: Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics.

news.headline: Was Donald Trump 'blocked' from using the nuclear codes against Iran?
news.summary: Former CIA analyst Larry Johnson alleged on a podcast this week that President Donald Trump wanted to use the nuclear codes against Iran during an emergency White House meeting, but that he was stopped by General Dan Caine, Chairman of his Joint Chiefs of Staff. news.headline: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
news.summary: More than four in every 10 deaths and disappearances occurred on sea routes to Europe, UN agency says.

news.headline: Canadian who was detained by China warns against Carney’s electric vehicle deal
news.summary:
A Canadian who was detained in China for nearly three years warned that Prime Minister Mark Carney’s electric vehicle deal risks creating a strategic dependency that the Asian superpower can exploit for political coercion.

news.headline: EU resumes aid to Ethiopia suspended over Tigray war
news.summary: In tonight's edition, the European Union is set to resume budgetary aid to Ethiopia, which was suspended when a brutal civil war broke out in 2020.
